description: Create a Psychological Refractory Period (PRP) dual-task experiment in PsychoPy Builder to test the attentional bottleneck by presenting two stimuli separated by a variable Stimulus Onset Asynchrony (SOA). Generate a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/prp_conditions.csv with columns for tone_freq, letter, soa, corr_resp_tone, and corr_resp_letter, including at least 10 trials mixing high/low tones (e.g., 300, 800 Hz), letters (e.g., H, S), and a range of SOAs (e.g., 0.05, 0.1, 0.4, 0.8). The experiment file, saved to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/prp_task.psyexp, must feature a trial routine containing a 0.5s fixation, an auditory stimulus starting at 0.5s, and a visual stimulus starting at 0.5s + SOA. The routine must record responses for both tasks over a fixed 3.0s duration without terminating after the first keypress. Ensure the trial routine is wrapped in a loop linked to the conditions file.
